'''gahasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chacona|chacona]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chacona|chacona]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gahasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæhæsæth|gæhæsæth]] || [[word:gæhæsæj|gæhæsæj]] || [[word:gæhæsæsh|gæhæsæsh]] || [[word:gæhæsæ|gæhæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahahasath|gahahasath]] || [[word:gahahasaj|gahahasaj]] || [[word:gahahasash|gahahasash]] || [[word:gahahasa|gahahasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahasath|gahasath]] || [[word:gahasaj|gahasaj]] || [[word:gahasash|gahasash]] || [[word:gahasa|gahasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahafsath|gahafsath]] || [[word:gahafsaj|gahafsaj]] || [[word:gahafsash|gahafsash]] || [[word:gahafsaf|gahafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gahasatha|gahasatha]] || [[word:gahasaja|gahasaja]] || [[word:gahasasha|gahasasha]] || [[word:gahasaka|gahasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gahasath|gahasath]] || [[word:gahasaj|gahasaj]] || [[word:gahasash|gahasash]] || [[word:gahasa|gahasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gahasathal|gahasathal]] || [[word:gahasajal|gahasajal]] || [[word:gahasashal|gahasashal]] || [[word:gahasakal|gahasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gahasathatha|gahasathatha]] || [[word:gahasajaja|gahasajaja]] || [[word:gahasashasha|gahasashasha]] || [[word:gahasaka|gahasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gahasathan|gahasathan]] || [[word:gahasajan|gahasajan]] || [[word:gahasashan|gahasashan]] || [[word:gahasakan|gahasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gahasathaoro|gahasathaoro]] || [[word:gahasajaoro|gahasajaoro]] || [[word:gahasashaoro|gahasashaoro]] || [[word:gahasakaoro|gahasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
